<!--
Coal is design-first. Before a large PR, please make sure the change is either:
  • a bug fix / build task tied to an issue, or
  • a design change already discussed and being ratified into SPEC.md.
See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix / build task (link the issue below)
- [ ] Spec / design ratification (updates `SPEC.md` + its decision log)
- [ ] Docs / housekeeping

## Checklist
- [ ] Small and focused (one decision or one fix)
- [ ] `SPEC.md` / `TODO.md` / `PLUGINS.md` updated if this changes decisions or scope
- [ ] Linked issues: closes #
